item.title: CFTC drops 'no-deny' settlement policy, following SEC's recent reversal on enforcement approach
Bitcoin, ether, SOL and XRP ETFs see combined $4.4B in outflows over 13 sessions; only HYPE products in the green
Coinbase freezes $3M in assets linked to Southeast Asia crypto fraud networks following law enforcement coordination
Apyx's STRC collateralized stablecoin briefly depegs; protocol calls the movement a design feature, not a bug
Bitcoin briefly drops below $62K as $1.5B in long positions are liquidated during broader crypto selloff
Bitmine plans dividend-paying preferred share issuance, echoing MicroStrategy's BTC treasury playbook
